Action.name: step
Action.to_char: You take a slow, measured step.

Action.name: temples
Action.to_char: You press your fingertips to your temples firmly.
Action.grimoire_text: fingertips pressed firmly to the temples

Action.name: circles
Action.to_char: You draw circles in the air.
Action.grimoire_text: hands tracing circles through the air

Action.name: focus
Action.to_char: You focus your mind, drawing in energies.

Action.name: raise
Action.to_char: You raise your hands in the air.

Action.name: draw
Action.to_char: You draw shapes and sigils in the air.
Action.grimoire_text: shapes and sigils drawn through the air

Action.name: chant
Action.to_room: $n begins to chant, but you don't recognise the language.
Action.grimoire_text: words chanted in a forgotten tongue

Action.name: trace
Action.to_char: You trace out symbols on nearby surfaces.

Action.name: entreat
Action.to_char: You entreat the powers to your aid.
Action.to_room: $n seems to call on some occult source of power.

Action.name: scratch
Action.to_char: You scratch symbols in the earth.

Action.name: splay
Action.to_char: You splay your hand before you with an outstretched arm.
Action.to_room: $n splays $s hand at arms length as if directing something.

Action.name: halt
Action.to_room: $n holds up $s hand, as if to demand 'Halt!'

Action.name: dance
Action.to_char: You dance around in a circle.
Action.grimoire_text: a ritual dance in a circle

Action.name: blood
Action.to_char: You draw blood from your hand.
Action.grimoire_text: an offering of blood drawn from the palm

Ritual.name: rite of pack creation
Ritual.sequence: entreat chant step circles chant raise howl entreat dance

Ritual.name: rite of recognition
Ritual.sequence: step raise step raise point splay halt blood point

Ritual.name: rite of the returning hero
Ritual.sequence: step raise step raise howl beat howl halt
